## Summary

<!-- What changed, why, and what behavior should reviewers verify? -->

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run test:backend`
- [ ] `npm run test:frontend`
- [ ] `npm run lint:frontend`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run audit:production`
- Not run / reason:

## Risk and rollback

- Compatibility or production impact:
- Rollback:
- [ ] No secrets, raw logs, production identifiers, or production data included.
- [ ] Any deploy, Nginx change, migration, backfill, or restart is called out for separate approval.
